summary: The crypto primitive divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in high-S signature rejection; no signer recovery behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 247: M	crates/primitives-traits/src/crypto.rs.
The isolated patch only changes `return Err(RecoveryError)` to a semicolon-terminated statement.
No secp256k1 low-S validation, signer recovery, or unchecked recovery behavior changed.
